predicate_mappings.operations_reviewer_assigned: {} is assigned to review operations for {}
predicate_mappings.counterparty_profile_assigned: {} is assigned to the counterparty profile for {}
predicate_mappings.primary_approval_by_approver_group: {} has primary approval by the approver group at {}
predicate_mappings.secondary_approver_confirmed: the secondary approver for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.cross_border_interlock_required: cross-border interlock is required for {} at {}
predicate_mappings.cross_border_interlock_linked: cross-border interlock is linked to {} at {}
predicate_mappings.final_checks_signed_off: final checks are signed off for {}
predicate_mappings.primary_approver_available: {} is available as the primary approver
predicate_mappings.business_reviewer_available: {} is available as the business reviewer
predicate_mappings.compliance_reviewer_available: {} is available as the compliance reviewer
predicate_mappings.operations_reviewer_available: {} is available as the operations reviewer

predicate_mappings.eligible_business_reviewer_for_transacti: {} is eligible as the business reviewer for {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_compliance_reviewer_for_transac: {} is eligible as the compliance reviewer for {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_operations_reviewer_for_transac: {} is eligible as the operations reviewer for {}

intake_open_case.description: open a transaction A for intake
preconditions: I can only open a transaction A for intake if it is not the case that A is opened and it is not the case that A is authorized
effects: Once I open a transaction A for intake, it is the case that A is opened

submit_transaction_by_submitter.description: submit a transaction A by a submitter B
preconditions: I can only submit a transaction A by a submitter B if it is the case that A is opened and B is available and B is eligible to submit A
I can only submit a transaction A by a submitter B if it is not the case that the submitter is linked to A
effects: Once I submit a transaction A by a submitter B, it is the case that A is submitted by B and the submitter is linked to A
Once I submit a transaction A by a submitter B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

withdraw_submission_by_submitter.description: withdraw submission of a transaction A by a submitter B
preconditions: I can only withdraw submission of a transaction A by a submitter B if it is the case that A is submitted by B
I can only withdraw submission of a transaction A by a submitter B if it is not the case that primary approval for A is recorded and it is not the case that dual approval for A is requested
effects: Once I withdraw submission of a transaction A by a submitter B, it is the case that B is available

Once I withdraw submission of a transaction A by a submitter B, it is not the case anymore that A is submitted by B and it is not the case anymore that the submitter is linked to A and it is not the case anymore that screening is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that screening is cleared for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires manual analyst review and it is not the case anymore that dual approval is recorded for A and it is not the case anymore that escalation is requested for A

assign_sanctions_service.description: assign a sanctions service B to a transaction A
preconditions: I can only assign a sanctions service B to a transaction A if it is the case that A is opened and B is available as the sanctions service
effects: Once I assign a sanctions service B to a transaction A, it is the case that A is assigned to the sanctions service B
Once I assign a sanctions service B to a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the sanctions service

unassign_sanctions_service.description: unassign a sanctions service B from a transaction A
preconditions: I can only unassign a sanctions service B from a transaction A if it is the case that A is assigned to the sanctions service B
effects: Once I unassign a sanctions service B from a transaction A, it is the case that B is available as the sanctions service
Once I unassign a sanctions service B from a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the sanctions service B

record_automated_screening_result.description: record automated screening result for a transaction A using a sanctions service B
preconditions: I can only record automated screening result for a transaction A using a sanctions service B if it is the case that A is opened and the submitter is linked to A and A is assigned to the sanctions service B
I can only record automated screening result for a transaction A using a sanctions service B if it is not the case that screening is assigned to A
effects: Once I record automated screening result for a transaction A using a sanctions service B, it is the case that screening is assigned to A

assign_delegated_approver_for_screening.description: assign a delegated approver B for screening of a transaction A
preconditions: I can only assign a delegated approver B for screening of a transaction A if it is the case that A is opened and the submitter is linked to A and B is available as the delegated approver
I can only assign a delegated approver B for screening of a transaction A if it is not the case that screening is assigned to A
effects: Once I assign a delegated approver B for screening of a transaction A, it is the case that screening is assigned to A and A requires manual analyst review
Once I assign a delegated approver B for screening of a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the delegated approver

analyst_validate_screening.description: validate screening for a transaction A using a sanctions service B by a sanctions analyst C
preconditions: I can only validate screening for a transaction A using a sanctions service B by a sanctions analyst C if it is the case that screening is assigned to A and the submitter is linked to A and A is assigned to the sanctions service B and C is available as a sanctions analyst
I can only validate screening for a transaction A using a sanctions service B by a sanctions analyst C if it is not the case that screening is cleared for A
effects: Once I validate screening for a transaction A using a sanctions service B by a sanctions analyst C, it is the case that screening is cleared for A
Once I validate screening for a transaction A using a sanctions service B by a sanctions analyst C, it is not the case anymore that A requires manual analyst review

approval_step_screening_clearance.description: approve screening clearance for a transaction A at an approval step B
preconditions: I can only approve screening clearance for a transaction A at an approval step B if it is the case that the submitter is linked to A and cross border interlock is linked to A at B
I can only approve screening clearance for a transaction A at an approval step B if it is not the case that screening is cleared for A
effects: Once I approve screening clearance for a transaction A at an approval step B, it is the case that screening is cleared for A
Once I approve screening clearance for a transaction A at an approval step B, it is not the case anymore that A requires manual analyst review

assign_business_reviewer.description: assign a business reviewer B to review a transaction A
preconditions: I can only assign a business reviewer B to review a transaction A if it is the case that A is opened and B is available as the business reviewer and B is eligible as the business reviewer for A
effects: Once I assign a business reviewer B to review a transaction A, it is the case that B is assigned to review A
Once I assign a business reviewer B to review a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the business reviewer

unassign_business_reviewer.description: unassign a business reviewer B from reviewing a transaction A
preconditions: I can only unassign a business reviewer B from reviewing a transaction A if it is the case that B is assigned to review A
effects: Once I unassign a business reviewer B from reviewing a transaction A, it is the case that B is available as the business reviewer
Once I unassign a business reviewer B from reviewing a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to review A

assign_compliance_reviewer.description: assign a compliance reviewer B to review compliance for a transaction A
preconditions: I can only assign a compliance reviewer B to review compliance for a transaction A if it is the case that A is opened and B is available as the compliance reviewer and B is eligible as the compliance reviewer for A
effects: Once I assign a compliance reviewer B to review compliance for a transaction A, it is the case that B is assigned to review compliance for A
Once I assign a compliance reviewer B to review compliance for a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the compliance reviewer

unassign_compliance_reviewer.description: unassign a compliance reviewer B from reviewing compliance for a transaction A
preconditions: I can only unassign a compliance reviewer B from reviewing compliance for a transaction A if it is the case that B is assigned to review compliance for A
effects: Once I unassign a compliance reviewer B from reviewing compliance for a transaction A, it is the case that B is available as the compliance reviewer
Once I unassign a compliance reviewer B from reviewing compliance for a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to review compliance for A

assign_operations_reviewer.description: assign an operations reviewer B to review operations for a transaction A
preconditions: I can only assign an operations reviewer B to review operations for a transaction A if it is the case that A is opened and B is available as the operations reviewer and B is eligible as the operations reviewer for A
effects: Once I assign an operations reviewer B to review operations for a transaction A, it is the case that B is assigned to review operations for A
Once I assign an operations reviewer B to review operations for a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the operations reviewer

unassign_operations_reviewer.description: unassign an operations reviewer B from reviewing operations for a transaction A
preconditions: I can only unassign an operations reviewer B from reviewing operations for a transaction A if it is the case that B is assigned to review operations for A
effects: Once I unassign an operations reviewer B from reviewing operations for a transaction A, it is the case that B is available as the operations reviewer
Once I unassign an operations reviewer B from reviewing operations for a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to review operations for A

assign_counterparty_profile.description: assign a counterparty profile B to a transaction A
preconditions: I can only assign a counterparty profile B to a transaction A if it is the case that A is opened and B is available as a counterparty profile and A has the counterparty profile B
effects: Once I assign a counterparty profile B to a transaction A, it is the case that B is assigned to the counterparty profile for A
Once I assign a counterparty profile B to a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a counterparty profile

unassign_counterparty_profile.description: unassign a counterparty profile B from a transaction A
preconditions: I can only unassign a counterparty profile B from a transaction A if it is the case that B is assigned to the counterparty profile for A
effects: Once I unassign a counterparty profile B from a transaction A, it is the case that B is available as a counterparty profile
Once I unassign a counterparty profile B from a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the counterparty profile for A

record_primary_approval.description: record primary approval for a transaction A by a primary approver group B at an approval step C with a business reviewer D
preconditions: I can only record primary approval for a transaction A by a primary approver group B at an approval step C with a business reviewer D if it is the case that the submitter is linked to A and C is assigned to review A and D is assigned to review compliance for A and B is available as the primary approver and B is eligible as the primary approver for A
I can only record primary approval for a transaction A by a primary approver group B at an approval step C with a business reviewer D if it is not the case that primary approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I record primary approval for a transaction A by a primary approver group B at an approval step C with a business reviewer D, it is the case that A has primary approval by the approver group at B and primary approval for A is recorded

Once I record primary approval for a transaction A by a primary approver group B at an approval step C with a business reviewer D, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the primary approver

record_primary_approval_with_investigati.description: record primary approval with investigation for a transaction A by a primary approver group B with an operations reviewer C using an investigative document D
preconditions: I can only record primary approval with investigation for a transaction A by a primary approver group B with an operations reviewer C using an investigative document D if it is the case that the submitter is linked to A and C is assigned to review operations for A and D is available as an investigative document and B is available as the primary approver and B is eligible as the primary approver for A and A has the investigative document D

I can only record primary approval with investigation for a transaction A by a primary approver group B with an operations reviewer C using an investigative document D if it is not the case that primary approval for A is recorded
effects: Once I record primary approval with investigation for a transaction A by a primary approver group B with an operations reviewer C using an investigative document D, it is the case that A has primary approval by the approver group at B and primary approval for A is recorded and escalation is requested for A and A requires manual analyst review

Once I record primary approval with investigation for a transaction A by a primary approver group B with an operations reviewer C using an investigative document D, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the primary approver and it is not the case anymore that D is available as an investigative document

acknowledge_escalation_marker.description: acknowledge escalation marker for a transaction A with a business reviewer B and a compliance reviewer C
preconditions: I can only acknowledge escalation marker for a transaction A with a business reviewer B and a compliance reviewer C if it is the case that primary approval for A is recorded and escalation is requested for A and B is assigned to review A and C is assigned to review compliance for A
effects: Once I acknowledge escalation marker for a transaction A with a business reviewer B and a compliance reviewer C, it is not the case anymore that escalation is requested for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires manual analyst review

request_dual_approval.description: request dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B, a compliance reviewer C, and a senior approver D
preconditions: I can only request dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B, a compliance reviewer C, and a senior approver D if it is the case that screening is cleared for A and primary approval for A is recorded and B is assigned to review A and C is assigned to review compliance for A and D is the escalation target for A

I can only request dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B, a compliance reviewer C, and a senior approver D if it is not the case that A requires manual analyst review and it is not the case that dual approval for A is requested
effects: Once I request dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B, a compliance reviewer C, and a senior approver D, it is the case that dual approval for A is requested

request_dual_approval_with_escalation.description: request dual approval with escalation for a transaction A involving an operations reviewer B, a counterparty profile C, and an executive approver D
preconditions: I can only request dual approval with escalation for a transaction A involving an operations reviewer B, a counterparty profile C, and an executive approver D if it is the case that screening is cleared for A and primary approval for A is recorded and B is assigned to review operations for A and C is assigned to the counterparty profile for A and D is the escalation target for A

I can only request dual approval with escalation for a transaction A involving an operations reviewer B, a counterparty profile C, and an executive approver D if it is not the case that dual approval for A is requested
effects: Once I request dual approval with escalation for a transaction A involving an operations reviewer B, a counterparty profile C, and an executive approver D, it is the case that dual approval for A is requested and A requires manual analyst review

complete_dual_approval.description: complete dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B and a compliance reviewer C
preconditions: I can only complete dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B and a compliance reviewer C if it is the case that dual approval for A is requested and A requires manual analyst review and B is assigned to review A and C is assigned to review compliance for A
effects: Once I complete dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B and a compliance reviewer C, it is the case that dual approval is recorded for A

Once I complete dual approval for a transaction A with a business reviewer B and a compliance reviewer C, it is not the case anymore that A requires manual analyst review and it is not the case anymore that screening is cleared for A and it is not the case anymore that escalation is requested for A

restore_screening_clearance_after_escala.description: restore screening clearance for a transaction A after escalation with a sanctions service B and a sanctions analyst C
preconditions: I can only restore screening clearance for a transaction A after escalation with a sanctions service B and a sanctions analyst C if it is the case that dual approval is recorded for A and dual approval for A is requested and the submitter is linked to A and A is assigned to the sanctions service B and C is available as a sanctions analyst
I can only restore screening clearance for a transaction A after escalation with a sanctions service B and a sanctions analyst C if it is not the case that screening is cleared for A
effects: Once I restore screening clearance for a transaction A after escalation with a sanctions service B and a sanctions analyst C, it is the case that screening is cleared for A

mark_secondary_approver_assigned_with_se.description: mark secondary approver as assigned for a transaction A with a sanctions service B
preconditions: I can only mark secondary approver as assigned for a transaction A with a sanctions service B if it is the case that dual approval for A is requested and screening is cleared for A and A is assigned to the sanctions service B

I can only mark secondary approver as assigned for a transaction A with a sanctions service B if it is not the case that A requires manual analyst review and it is not the case that the secondary approver for A is confirmed
effects: Once I mark secondary approver as assigned for a transaction A with a sanctions service B, it is the case that the secondary approver for A is confirmed

mark_secondary_approver_assigned.description: mark a delegated approver B as secondary approver for a transaction A
preconditions: I can only mark a delegated approver B as secondary approver for a transaction A if it is the case that dual approval for A is requested and screening is cleared for A and B is available as the delegated approver

I can only mark a delegated approver B as secondary approver for a transaction A if it is not the case that A requires manual analyst review and it is not the case that the secondary approver for A is confirmed
effects: Once I mark a delegated approver B as secondary approver for a transaction A, it is the case that the secondary approver for A is confirmed
Once I mark a delegated approver B as secondary approver for a transaction A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as the delegated approver

bind_secondary_approval_step.description: bind a transaction A to an approval step B for secondary approval
preconditions: I can only bind a transaction A to an approval step B for secondary approval if it is the case that the secondary approver for A is confirmed and B is available for approval and A is bound to the transaction step B
effects: Once I bind a transaction A to an approval step B for secondary approval, it is the case that A requires secondary approval by B
Once I bind a transaction A to an approval step B for secondary approval, it is not the case anymore that B is available for approval

link_cross_border_interlock.description: link cross border interlock for a cross border transaction A with a domestic transaction B at an approval step C
preconditions: I can only link cross border interlock for a cross border transaction A with a domestic transaction B at an approval step C if it is the case that A is opened and A is a cross border transaction and cross border interlock is required for A at C and B requires secondary approval by C
I can only link cross border interlock for a cross border transaction A with a domestic transaction B at an approval step C if it is not the case that cross border interlock is linked to A at C
effects: Once I link cross border interlock for a cross border transaction A with a domestic transaction B at an approval step C, it is the case that cross border interlock is linked to A at C

mark_final_checks_ready.description: mark final checks ready for a transaction A using a sanctions service B with a sanctions analyst C
preconditions: I can only mark final checks ready for a transaction A using a sanctions service B with a sanctions analyst C if it is the case that A is opened and A is a cross border transaction and screening is cleared for A and the secondary approver for A is confirmed and A is assigned to the sanctions service B and C is available as a sanctions analyst
I can only mark final checks ready for a transaction A using a sanctions service B with a sanctions analyst C if it is not the case that final checks are signed off for A
effects: Once I mark final checks ready for a transaction A using a sanctions service B with a sanctions analyst C, it is the case that final checks are signed off for A

finalize_domestic_authorization.description: finalize domestic authorization for a transaction A
preconditions: I can only finalize domestic authorization for a transaction A if it is the case that A is a domestic transaction and A is opened and the submitter is linked to A and primary approval for A is recorded and dual approval for A is requested and the secondary approver for A is confirmed and screening is cleared for A
I can only finalize domestic authorization for a transaction A if it is not the case that A is authorized
effects: Once I finalize domestic authorization for a transaction A, it is the case that A is authorized

finalize_authorization_with_step.description: finalize authorization for a transaction A with an approval step B
preconditions: I can only finalize authorization for a transaction A with an approval step B if it is the case that A is a cross border transaction and A is opened and the submitter is linked to A and primary approval for A is recorded and dual approval for A is requested and the secondary approver for A is confirmed and screening is cleared for A and cross border interlock is linked to A at B
I can only finalize authorization for a transaction A with an approval step B if it is not the case that A is authorized
effects: Once I finalize authorization for a transaction A with an approval step B, it is the case that A is authorized

finalize_authorization_with_final_checks.description: finalize authorization for a transaction A with final checks
preconditions: I can only finalize authorization for a transaction A with final checks if it is the case that A is a cross border transaction and A is opened and the submitter is linked to A and primary approval for A is recorded and dual approval for A is requested and the secondary approver for A is confirmed and screening is cleared for A and final checks are signed off for A
I can only finalize authorization for a transaction A with final checks if it is not the case that A is authorized
effects: Once I finalize authorization for a transaction A with final checks, it is the case that A is authorized

action_nl_templates.withdraw_submission_by_submitter: withdraw submission of transaction {?transaction} by submitter {?submitter}
action_nl_templates.record_automated_screening_result: record automated screening result for transaction {?transaction} using sanctions service {?sanctions_service}
action_nl_templates.assign_delegated_approver_for_screening: assign delegated approver {?delegated_approver} for screening of transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.analyst_validate_screening: validate screening for transaction {?transaction} using sanctions service {?sanctions_service} by sanctions analyst {?sanctions_analyst}
action_nl_templates.approval_step_screening_clearance: approve screening clearance for transaction {?transaction} at approval step {?approval_step}
action_nl_templates.assign_business_reviewer: assign business reviewer {?business_reviewer} to review transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.unassign_business_reviewer: unassign business reviewer {?business_reviewer} from reviewing transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.assign_compliance_reviewer: assign compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer} to review compliance for transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.unassign_compliance_reviewer: unassign compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer} from reviewing compliance for transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.assign_operations_reviewer: assign operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer} to review operations for transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.unassign_operations_reviewer: unassign operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer} from reviewing operations for transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.record_primary_approval: record primary approval for transaction {?transaction} by primary approver group {?primary_approver_group} at approval step {?approval_step} with business reviewer {?business_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.record_primary_approval_with_investigati: record primary approval with investigation for transaction {?transaction} by primary approver group {?primary_approver_group} with operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer} using investigative document {?investigative_document}
action_nl_templates.acknowledge_escalation_marker: acknowledge escalation marker for transaction {?transaction} with business reviewer {?business_reviewer} and compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.request_dual_approval: request dual approval for transaction {?transaction} with business reviewer {?business_reviewer}, compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer}, and senior approver {?senior_approver}
action_nl_templates.request_dual_approval_with_escalation: request dual approval with escalation for transaction {?transaction} involving operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer}, counterparty profile {?counterparty_profile}, and executive approver {?executive_approver}
action_nl_templates.complete_dual_approval: complete dual approval for transaction {?transaction} with business reviewer {?business_reviewer} and compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.restore_screening_clearance_after_escala: restore screening clearance for transaction {?transaction} after escalation with sanctions service {?sanctions_service} and sanctions analyst {?sanctions_analyst}
action_nl_templates.mark_secondary_approver_assigned_with_se: mark secondary approver as assigned for transaction {?transaction} with sanctions service {?sanctions_service}
action_nl_templates.mark_secondary_approver_assigned: mark delegated approver {?delegated_approver} as secondary approver for transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates.bind_secondary_approval_step: bind transaction {?transaction} to approval step {?approval_step} for secondary approval
action_nl_templates.link_cross_border_interlock: link cross-border interlock for cross-border transaction {?cross_border_transaction} with domestic transaction {?domestic_transaction} at approval step {?approval_step}
action_nl_templates.mark_final_checks_ready: mark final checks ready for transaction {?transaction} using sanctions service {?sanctions_service} with sanctions analyst {?sanctions_analyst}
action_nl_templates.finalize_authorization_with_step: finalize authorization for transaction {?transaction} with approval step {?approval_step}
action_nl_templates.finalize_authorization_with_final_checks: finalize authorization for transaction {?transaction} with final checks

predicate_nl_templates.compliance_reviewer_assigned: {?compliance_reviewer} is assigned to review compliance for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.operations_reviewer_assigned: {?operations_reviewer} is assigned to review operations for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.counterparty_profile_assigned: {?counterparty_profile} is assigned to the counterparty profile for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.primary_approval_by_approver_group: {?transaction} has primary approval by the approver group at {?approval_step}
predicate_nl_templates.secondary_approver_confirmed: the secondary approver for {?transaction} is confirmed
predicate_nl_templates.cross_border_interlock_required: cross-border interlock is required for {?transaction} at {?approval_step}
predicate_nl_templates.cross_border_interlock_linked: cross-border interlock is linked to {?transaction} at {?approval_step}
predicate_nl_templates.final_checks_signed_off: final checks are signed off for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.primary_approver_available: {?primary_approver_group} is available as the primary approver
predicate_nl_templates.business_reviewer_available: {?business_reviewer} is available as the business reviewer
predicate_nl_templates.compliance_reviewer_available: {?compliance_reviewer} is available as the compliance reviewer
predicate_nl_templates.operations_reviewer_available: {?operations_reviewer} is available as the operations reviewer
predicate_nl_templates.sanctions_service_available: {?sanctions_service} is available as the sanctions service
predicate_nl_templates.delegated_approver_available: {?delegated_approver} is available as the delegated approver
predicate_nl_templates.sanctions_analyst_available: {?sanctions_analyst} is available as a sanctions analyst
predicate_nl_templates.investigative_document_available: {?investigative_document} is available as an investigative document
predicate_nl_templates.counterparty_profile_available: {?counterparty_profile} is available as a counterparty profile
predicate_nl_templates.eligible_primary_approver_for_transactio: {?primary_approver_group} is eligible as the primary approver for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.eligible_business_reviewer_for_transacti: {?business_reviewer} is eligible as the business reviewer for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.eligible_compliance_reviewer_for_transac: {?compliance_reviewer} is eligible as the compliance reviewer for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.eligible_operations_reviewer_for_transac: {?operations_reviewer} is eligible as the operations reviewer for {?transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.transaction_assigned_to_sanctions_servic: {?transaction} is assigned to the sanctions service {?sanctions_service}
predicate_nl_templates.transaction_step_binding: {?transaction} is bound to the transaction step {?approval_step}

action_nl_templates_indef.submit_transaction_by_submitter: submit a transaction {?transaction} by a submitter {?submitter}
action_nl_templates_indef.withdraw_submission_by_submitter: withdraw submission of a transaction {?transaction} by a submitter {?submitter}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_sanctions_service: assign a sanctions service {?sanctions_service} to a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_sanctions_service: unassign a sanctions service {?sanctions_service} from a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_automated_screening_result: record automated screening result for a transaction {?transaction} using a sanctions service {?sanctions_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_delegated_approver_for_screening: assign a delegated approver {?delegated_approver} for screening of a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.analyst_validate_screening: validate screening for a transaction {?transaction} using a sanctions service {?sanctions_service} by a sanctions analyst {?sanctions_analyst}
action_nl_templates_indef.approval_step_screening_clearance: approve screening clearance for a transaction {?transaction} at an approval step {?approval_step}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_business_reviewer: assign a business reviewer {?business_reviewer} to review a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_business_reviewer: unassign a business reviewer {?business_reviewer} from reviewing a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_compliance_reviewer: assign a compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer} to review compliance for a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_compliance_reviewer: unassign a compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer} from reviewing compliance for a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_operations_reviewer: assign an operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer} to review operations for a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_operations_reviewer: unassign an operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer} from reviewing operations for a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_counterparty_profile: assign a counterparty profile {?counterparty_profile} to a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_counterparty_profile: unassign a counterparty profile {?counterparty_profile} from a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_primary_approval: record primary approval for a transaction {?transaction} by a primary approver group {?primary_approver_group} at an approval step {?approval_step} with a business reviewer {?business_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_primary_approval_with_investigati: record primary approval with investigation for a transaction {?transaction} by a primary approver group {?primary_approver_group} with an operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer} using an investigative document {?investigative_document}
action_nl_templates_indef.acknowledge_escalation_marker: acknowledge escalation marker for a transaction {?transaction} with a business reviewer {?business_reviewer} and a compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_dual_approval: request dual approval for a transaction {?transaction} with a business reviewer {?business_reviewer}, a compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer}, and a senior approver {?senior_approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_dual_approval_with_escalation: request dual approval with escalation for a transaction {?transaction} involving an operations reviewer {?operations_reviewer}, a counterparty profile {?counterparty_profile}, and an executive approver {?executive_approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_dual_approval: complete dual approval for a transaction {?transaction} with a business reviewer {?business_reviewer} and a compliance reviewer {?compliance_reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.restore_screening_clearance_after_escala: restore screening clearance for a transaction {?transaction} after escalation with a sanctions service {?sanctions_service} and a sanctions analyst {?sanctions_analyst}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_secondary_approver_assigned_with_se: mark secondary approver as assigned for a transaction {?transaction} with a sanctions service {?sanctions_service}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_secondary_approver_assigned: mark a delegated approver {?delegated_approver} as secondary approver for a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_secondary_approval_step: bind a transaction {?transaction} to an approval step {?approval_step} for secondary approval
action_nl_templates_indef.link_cross_border_interlock: link cross-border interlock for a cross-border transaction {?cross_border_transaction} with a domestic transaction {?domestic_transaction} at an approval step {?approval_step}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_final_checks_ready: mark final checks ready for a transaction {?transaction} using a sanctions service {?sanctions_service} with a sanctions analyst {?sanctions_analyst}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_domestic_authorization: finalize domestic authorization for a transaction {?transaction}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_authorization_with_step: finalize authorization for a transaction {?transaction} with an approval step {?approval_step}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_authorization_with_final_checks: finalize authorization for a transaction {?transaction} with final checks

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a transaction or a submitter or a primary approver group or a compliance reviewer or a business reviewer or a operations reviewer or a sanctions service or a delegated approver or a approval step or a sanctions analyst or a investigative document or a counterparty profile or a escalation target is also a object
Everything that is a senior approver or a executive approver is also a escalation target
Everything that is a domestic transaction or a cross border transaction is also a transaction
